# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - test
  - deploy

variables:
  GIT_STRATEGY: clone
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive
  CI_REGISTRY: $CI_REGISTRY
  CI_REGISTRY_USER: $CI_REGISTRY_USER
  CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD: $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || (apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y)'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
  - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
  - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
  - ssh-keyscan $SSH_HOST >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  - chmod 600 ~/.ssh/known_hosts

build:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - chmod +x ./scripts/build.sh
    - ./scripts/build.sh
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 1 week
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^feature-.*$/
    - /^release-.*$/
  except:
    - tags

test:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - chmod +x ./scripts/test.sh
    - ./scripts/test.sh
  only:
    - main
    - develop
    - /^feature-.*$/
    - /^release-.*$/
  except:
    - tags

deploy:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - chmod +x ./scripts/deploy.sh
    - ./scripts/deploy.sh
  only:
    - main
  environment:
    name: production
    url: $PRODUCTION_URL
  when: manual

security:
  stage: build
  image: alpine:latest
  script:
    - chmod +x ./scripts/security-check.sh
    - ./scripts/security-check.sh
  only:
    - main
    - develop
  except:
    - tags

cache:
  key: "$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG"
  paths:
    - .cache/
    - node_modules/
    - vendor/

workflow:
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "web" || $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "schedule"
      when: always
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "push"
      when: always
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
      when: always
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "tag"
      when: always

include:
  - local: .gitlab/ci/custom-builds.yml
  - local: .gitlab/ci/security.yml
